TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: to the Zionist organization as a delegate to the congress. And those were my activities. In the summer, we arranged summer camps. First, I arranged the summer camp for our state only. And we went in the mountains. And I was in charge of the camp-- about 400, 500 young boys and girls. And we spent four weeks in the mountains in the camp. After this camp in July, in August,

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
went in the mountains.
